task: Find the lowest-priced Student housing near Liverpool International College which has been priced between 100 to 300 pounds and has a private bathroom.
final_result_response:
Based on my thorough research using the archived version of student.com (since the live site currently only supports US & Canada), I have all the data needed to answer the question.

## Lowest-Priced Student Housing near Liverpool International College on student.com

### 🏆 Lowest-Priced Property (£100–£300/week, Private Bathroom):

**Cambridge Court**
- 💰 **Price:** £115/week *(lowest in the £100–£300 range)*
- 🚿 **Bathroom:** Private Room (ensuite)
- ⭐ Rating: 25 reviews
- 🎁 Special Offer: £250 Cashback
- 🧾 Bills included: Water, Electricity, Heating, Gas
- 🏪 Amenities: Laundry Facilities, Bike Storage, Social Space(s)
- 🔗 Link: https://www.student.com/en-gb/uk/liverpool/p/cambridge-court?university_slug=liverpool-international-college

judge.reasoning:

The data extraction was programmatic and based on actual archived HTML content from student.com.

**Summary:** The agent successfully extracted real property listings from an archived student.com page (Wayback Machine, Aug 2021) for Liverpool International College, identified 8 properties in the £100-300 range with private bathrooms, and correctly identified Cambridge Court at £115/week as the lowest-priced option.
